overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting the Slytherin common room and dormitory. The clip opens with a static view of students relaxing in the dimly lit, stone-walled common room, then transitions to third-person perspective following a character as they walk through corridors, ascend a grand staircase, and enter their dormitory to sleep.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with seating and fireplace

events.description: student in dark robes walks from left to right past the seating area
group of students walks through the background near the fireplace

agents.ego_description: sitting in an armchair observing the common room activity and students passing by

notable_agents.action: student in dark clothing walking past the table from left to right
student sitting by the fireplace in the background

small circular table with papers and a lamp
lit table lamp with brass fixture providing warm ambient light
large stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling
large gothic fireplace with fire burning in the background
ornate lantern suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: A static view of a dimly lit gothic common room with stone architecture and warm lamplight. An ornate leather armchair sits in the foreground while students occasionally walk through the space, passing by the stone pillars and fireplace in the background.

events.description: camera switches from static view to third-person follow perspective behind the character
character turns slightly right toward the staircase entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room toward the exit corridor and staircase

entered.detail: decorative woven tapestry depicting medieval scenes on the stone wall
gothic stone arch leading to the corridor
simple wooden bench against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to follow a character with red hair walking through the stone corridors. The camera moves past tapestries and stone arches as the character heads toward a staircase, leaving the common room seating area behind.

events.description: character enters and begins ascending the grand staircase
passing under a green stained glass window casting colored light onto the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase with ornate iron railings toward the upper level

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps curving upward
ornate black iron railing with decorative scrollwork
large arched stained glass window with green and blue panes
lit wall-mounted lamp with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase enclosed by stone walls and illuminated by wall sconces. A large stained glass window above casts green-tinted light down onto the stairs as the character climbs higher.

events.description: character opens wooden door and enters the dormitory room

agents.ego_description: walking down the upper corridor and opening the door to enter the dormitory

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with decorative glass panels and iron hinges
interior space with multiple beds visible through the doorway

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character walks along a narrow upper corridor toward a wooden door. The character opens the door and steps into the dormitory room beyond.

events.description: game UI overlay appears in bottom right displaying '11:00pm Bedtime'

agents.ego_description: approaching the four-poster bed to end the day and sleep

entered.detail: large wooden four-poster bed with green velvet curtains and white bedding
heavy green drapes hanging from the bed canopy
storage chest at the foot of the bed
tall standing lamp with glowing glass orb

segments.scene_description: Inside the dormitory, the character walks toward a four-poster bed with green curtains. A UI element appears indicating it is 11:00pm bedtime. The character stops at the bedside, ready to interact with the bed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a dimly lit gothic common room defined by its heavy stone architecture and warm, flickering lamplight. It begins with a focus on an ornate leather armchair in the foreground, establishing a sense of quiet luxury. As the camera lingers, students occasionally drift through the space, their movement drawing attention toward the massive stone pillars and a glowing fireplace in the background. The scene remains anchored in this moody, subterranean environment, emphasizing the contrast between the deep shadows of the masonry and the soft gold of the interior lighting.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the public stone corridors of a castle into the private sanctuary of a student dormitory. It begins by following a red-haired character moving past tapestries and stone arches, leaving the common room seating area behind. As the character reaches a grand staircase, the camera ascends through a space illuminated by wall sconces and a large stained glass window that casts a green-tinted glow over the stone walls. The scene then shifts to a narrow upper corridor where the character opens a wooden door to enter the dormitory. Finally, the camera follows them toward a four-poster bed with green curtains as a bedtime UI element appears, bringing the journey to a stop at the bedside.
